hero.subtitle: Secure digital tontines, smart savings and a mobile wallet connected to Togolese Mobile Money operators.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: BankVi brings together in one app the community financial tools West Africa needs.
features.esso_desc: Create and manage collective digital tontines with 3 draw modes, blockchain traceability and automatic notifications.
features.esso_detail_1: 3 draw modes: fixed rotation, random or interactive wheel
features.esso_detail_2: Results recorded on the Polygon blockchain
features.esso_detail_3: Late payment management and automatic notifications
features.tiro_desc: Programmable savings sub-accounts with custom goals, locked or semi-flexible modes.
features.tiro_detail_1: Goals in XOF with progress tracking
features.tiro_detail_2: Locked or semi-flexible mode with configurable penalty
features.tiro_detail_3: Fund from wallet or Mobile Money
features.wallet_desc: Centralize all your financial flows. Deposits, withdrawals, internal transfers and ESSO payments from a unified interface.
features.wallet_detail_2: Free internal transfers between BankVi wallets
features.blockchain_desc: Total transparency via the Polygon blockchain. Every draw, every ESSO cycle is recorded immutably.
features.blockchain_detail_2: Proof of execution for winnings transfers
features.blockchain_detail_3: Polygon explorer integrated into admin interface

mobile_money.title: Native Mobile Money integration
mobile_money.subtitle: BankVi is natively connected to Togolese Mobile Money operators via FedaPay, without redirects or friction.
mobile_money.moov_desc: Direct deposits and withdrawals via your Flooz account.
mobile_money.tmoney_desc: Instant collection and sending to your T-Money account.
mobile_money.fedapay_desc: The leading payment gateway in West Africa for secure transactions.

trust.title: Banking-level security
trust.subtitle: Your money and data are protected by the same standards as financial institutions.
trust.kyc_desc: Complete identity verification for all users accessing advanced features.
trust.jwt_desc: Short-lived access tokens with secure refresh tokens and automatic rotation.
trust.biometric_desc: Unlock the app with your fingerprint, Face ID or a 6-digit PIN code.
trust.blockchain_desc: Every ESSO draw is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, verifiable by all.

download.title: Download BankVi
download.subtitle: Available on iOS and Android. Liquid glass design, native performance, premium experience.

blog.title: News & Insights
blog.subtitle: Stay informed about the latest news from BankVi and digital finance in Africa.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about BankVi.

contact.subtitle: A question, partnership or feedback? Our team replies within 24h.
